basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website csmcri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: For Project Associate-I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per CSIR rules.

qualification.details: For Project Associate-I: M. Sc. in Chemistry

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs.31,000/- + HRA (as applicable) or Rs.25,000/- + HRA (as applicable)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CSMCRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Project Associate-I: M. Sc. in Chemistry

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: For Project Associate-I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per CSIR rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Rs.31,000/- + HRA (as applicable) or Rs.25,000/- + HRA (as applicable)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview, so there is no last date to apply. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Project Associate-I posts at CSIR CSMCRI is scheduled for 07 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate-I in CSIR CSMCRI?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate-I post in the Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Associate-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules of CSIR.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Project Associate-I position must possess an M. Sc. degree in Chemistry from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at CSIR CSMCRI?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate-I is Rs.31,000/- + HRA (as applicable) or Rs.25,000/- + HRA (as applicable) per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate-I walk-in interview at CSIR CSMCRI.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR CSMCRI is based solely on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be evaluated during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the CSIR CSMCRI office in Bhavnagar, Gujarat. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the exact venue details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificate. A filled application form and passport-size photographs may also be required.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview, so there is no last date to apply. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, 07 July 2026.
